name: American International Group, Inc.
h1: American International's GCC footprint in India
lede: American International runs three centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram and Chennai, covering CoE and IT, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one American International office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American International GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: American International runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Chennai), covering CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: American International's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram and Chennai, spanning CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does American International operate in India?
faq.a: American International operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does American International have centers in?
faq.a: American International's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does American International run in India?
faq.a: American International runs CoE and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at American International's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for American International's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads American International's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at American International's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
